programme.desc: The untold story of the Witches of Oz, spotlighting the untold stories of Oz's most infamous characters.

programme.title: Save the Last Dance
programme.desc: A small-town girl with big dreams must face the biggest challenge of her life – to stay true to her dream and her new romance.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: When Grandpa Max's engineer buddy Phil Billings gifts Team Tennyson the Omni-Copter - a state of the art flying vehicle that can transport the Rustbucket for overseas adventures.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: During one last stop by a toy store before Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max's maiden voyage across the Atlantic, Ben runs into an old bully, Kevin 11, who now has new powers - able to transform into aliens just like Ben, such as the 'bootleg' doppelgänger of Cannonbolt-- Wreckingbolt!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Team Tennyson goes international in the Omni-Copter and the first stop is for a hike in the Scottish Highlands, but the weather isn't just bad, it's foggy, and that means one thing and one thing only: the return of The Fogg!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Back stateside, Ben can't get into a cat cosplay competition, Top Tail, without a costume of his own, but when he goes Rath - a new cat-like alien with an attitude - Ben's newfound wild side quickly becomes much more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max next travel to Castle Bishopbrook to visit a distant relative who's royalty, but when Ben encounters a 'ghost' at the haunted home, it turns out to actually be his new rival, Kevin 11, throwing even more twisted aliens his way: Thornblade, Undertow, and Dark Matter!

programme.title: Ruby and the Well S1
programme.desc: When Daniel and Ruby move to the orchard home inherited from Daniel’s eccentric uncle, it seems inhospitable - until Ruby discovers a magic well.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe S1
programme.desc: Prince Ivandoe and Bert set off on their heroic quest and, almost immediately, a winged serpent steals their map to Eagle Mountain.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe S1
programme.desc: A fire-breathing Giant Chicken is destroying the local farmers' prize vegetables. Prince Ivandoe vows to capture the Giant Chicken, but... gets captured by her instead.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe S1
programme.desc: When Prince Ivandoe valiantly sets free Brian the Bard, he discovers he is now stuck with him... until such time that Brian saves Prince Ivandoe's life in return.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe S1
programme.desc: In an effort to impress Jezebel the thiefstress, Prince Ivandoe and Bert set off to find the elusive Centicore.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe S1
programme.desc: Prince Ivandoe vows to capture the turnip thief... the very worst type of thief!

programme.title: The Life & Times of Juniper Lee S1
programme.desc: June has been doing her Te Xuan Ze thing (acting as the Protector) for just over a month, and it's become a real hassle.

programme.title: The Life & Times of Juniper Lee S1
programme.desc: When June's school chorus goes to a nursing home to perform, Roger finds half of a cursed Viking medallion.

programme.title: The Life & Times of Juniper Lee S1
programme.desc: Every year on April Fools' Day, Orchid Bay City is overrun by practical jokes.

programme.title: Star Trek: Section 31
programme.desc: Emperor Philippa Georgiou joins a secret division of Starfleet, tasked with protecting the United Federation of Planets.

programme.title: The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world’s largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. “The Dean” David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown. But which dog will have their day, and which will leave with their tail between their legs? After all, there can only be one “Best in Show”.

programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop pet-sit Crabby, who acts out until they realize he’s missing home. / Kelp feels like he can’t choose between a celebration on land or under the sea. So he attempts to do both... at the same time!

programme.desc: Gloria becomes determined to earn her Queen of Kindness Kidizen badge and welcomes some free-spirited rats who need a place to stay into the habitat. Despite her discomfort, Gloria encourages the rats to make themselves at home. When the rats play with her special baby tusk at the bottom of her tank, she finally snaps and sends the rats home. It isn't until the gang winds up at the rats' nest and Gloria almost takes a slice of the rats special cheese that she learns it's okay to say no.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Alex realizes he’s too small to climb onto his new habitat “stage”, he feels too small for his dreams- until he hears of a big, new roller coaster at Coney Island and figures if he can ride the big coaster, that’ll prove that he’s a BIG deal! But when Alex is too short to be allowed on the ride- and his friends find themselves stuck at the top of it- Alex saves the day when he realizes that there are advantages to being small, and learns that his body is perfect just the way it is.

programme.title: Mad Concrete Dreams
programme.desc: Upon achieving the coveted status of a landlord, mounting debts lead Soo-Jong into participating a staged kidnapping, yet the plan spirals out of control as the fake kidnapping turns dangerously real.

programme.title: Mad Concrete Dreams
programme.desc: Upon achieving the coveted status of a landlord, mounting debts lead Soo-Jong into participating a staged kidnapping, yet the plan spirals out of control as the fake kidnapping turns dangerously real.

programme.title: You Can Cook With Sam Kim
programme.desc: Star chef Sam Kim will teach you how to make all kinds of delicious dishes – from Italian pasta, Spanish food to desserts! Follow his easy recipes and enjoy cooking!

programme.title: You Can Cook With Sam Kim
programme.desc: Star chef Sam Kim will teach you how to make all kinds of delicious dishes – from Italian pasta, Spanish food to desserts! Follow his easy recipes and enjoy cooking!

programme.title: Yumi's Cells 3
programme.desc: Yu-mi, a bestselling novelist, meets her new editor Soon-rok. With her Love Cell still asleep from heartbreak, his quiet charm stirs something new. Could he be her long awaited endgame?

programme.title: GBRB: Farm Operation - Go Go Farm
programme.desc: The ultimate bestie trio Lee Kwang-soo, Kim Woo-bin, and Doh Kyung-soo head to Jeju Island for a "farm-tastic" new farm stay adventure.

programme.title: World of Street Woman Fighter
programme.desc: The <Street Woman Fighter> series make a triumphant return on a global stage! 6 dance crews from different countries set to compete in an upgraded match to win the title of International Champion!

programme.title: Undercover Chef - Korea
programme.desc: Top celebrity chefs go undercover as a junior kitchen staff in the very country that shaped their culinary roots, challenge to earn recognition from locals in 5 days!

programme.title: The Canton Godfather
programme.desc: A country boy becomes the head of a gang through the purchase of some lucky roses from an old lady.

programme.title: Taken from Rio Bravo
programme.desc: In 1874 Texas, two friends and an Indian scout rescue kidnapped women from sadistic traffickers near the Mexican border.

programme.title: Kickboxer: Retaliation
programme.desc: An MMA champion finds himself trapped in a prison in Thailand and is freedom depends on defeating a 400-pound killer in an underground match.

programme.title: Stonehearst Asylum
programme.desc: An Oxford graduate takes up a job in a mental asylum only to discover that the "revolutionary" new treatments are inhumane and that there is more going on than meets the eye

programme.title: A Better Tomorrow 3
programme.desc: A man travels from China to Vietnam, on the brink of war with America, to retrieve his uncle and cousin but finds complications when he falls in love with a female gangster with a dangerous ex

programme.title: Little Big Soldier
programme.desc: An old soldier kidnaps a young General of an enemy state and takes him on a long journey to collect the reward.

programme.title: 3 Am Part 3
programme.desc: Three different short movies revolving around a similar theme: a sinister presence when the clock strikes 3.00 am.

programme.title: Fist of Fury
programme.desc: A young man seeks vengeance for the death of his teacher

programme.title: The Vanishing
programme.desc: Three lighthouse keepers on the remote Flannan Isles find a hidden trunk of gold that becomes the catalyst to a struggle for survival

programme.title: Tully

programme.title: The Battle: Roar to Victory

programme.title: Escape Room

programme.title: Wild Portugal
programme.desc: Rivers are lifelines in Wild Portugal, connecting mountains to the sea. Discover the Deer stag, frogs' spring rituals, and Grebes' dances, along with other animals and landscapes along these vital waterways.

programme.title: Wild Portugal
programme.desc: Portugal’s coastal waters and the Azores archipelago boast rich ecosystems. Explore the diverse species living in these waters and discover their unique lives in this revealing episode.

programme.title: Fantastic Friends
programme.desc: In Poland, Sophie trades a calm weekend for a rush of adventure: trekking the towering Tatras, rafting wild rivers, uncovering a legendary salt mine, and so much more!

programme.title: Fantastic Friends
programme.desc: In Innsbruck, the twins whisk Haley to an alpine wonderland of skiing, bobsledding, après-ski drinks, and a magical trip down childhood stardom—plus a touch of witchcraft!

programme.title: Fantastic Friends
programme.desc: In Ireland, the twins join Evanna and her family for hurling matches, traditional dance, Potter nostalgia, and a spine-tingling countryside adventure!

programme.title: The Presidents
programme.desc: Documentary examines George W. Bush's presidency, focusing on the Iraq War, its aftermath, and the lasting impact of his decisions, including the rise of ISIS and the human toll of the conflict.

programme.title: The Presidents
programme.desc: Ronald Reagan, a charismatic leader, transformed America with Reaganomics, dividing opinion at home and abroad, and forever changing Conservatism with his visionary policies and iconic speeches.

programme.title: Keanu Reeves: The One And Only
programme.desc: The journey of Keanu Reeves, travel through his youth, his versatile filmography and his many emotinal peaks and troughs to uncover what makes this fantastic icon so celebrated.

programme.title: Neymar: Brazil's Number One
programme.desc: From the streets of Santos to becoming Brazil's number one goal scorer, the 20-year journey of Neymar is one for the history books. Having played football on nearly every continent, Neymar will go down as a legend of the game, forever.

programme.title: Gerrard: Born To Lead
programme.desc: In an illustrious professional career that spans over 20 years, Gerrard has experienced and succeeded at the pinnacle of the sport, lifting trophies as a player and manager, and representing his country. But with the highs, came the lows.

programme.title: Cristiano Ronaldo: The One And Only
programme.desc: Witness the journey from the young Portuguese prodigy to one of the greatest players of all time. This is the one and only...Cristiano Ronaldo.

programme.title: Kylian Mbappé: Rising Star
programme.desc: There are few players who capture the imagination of fans worldwide quite like Kylian Mbappé. In just over a decade, he went from absolute obscurity to becoming one of the most famous players in the world.

programme.title: Messi: The Chosen One
programme.desc: This documentary offers an intimate and comprehensive journey through the extraordinary career of Lionel Messi — from his humble beginnings in Rosario, Argentina, to becoming a global football icon.

programme.title: Andy Murray: Game, Set, Match
programme.desc: From a small-town prodigy to World No. 1, Andy Murray: Game Set Match chronicles his relentless pursuit of greatness, his battles with injury, and his enduring legacy as one of tennis's most inspiring figures.

programme.title: Keanu Reeves: The One And Only
programme.desc: The journey of Keanu Reeves, travel through his youth, his versatile filmography and his many emotinal peaks and troughs to uncover what makes this fantastic icon so celebrated.

programme.title: Whitney: Behind The Voice
programme.desc: A powerful journey into the meteoric rise of Whitney Houston — from her gospel roots to global superstardom — unraveling the tangled relationships, haunting battles with addiction, and the heartbreaking fall of a once-unshakable voice, before her untimely end.

programme.title: Celine Dion: The Heart Goes On
programme.desc: Celine Dion is a household name, synonymous with musical brilliance. Yet, her life has not been untouched by hardship. Join us as we uncover the story behind the legend, her meteoric rise to fame, and the personal trials that shaped her remarkable career.

programme.title: Air Warriors S10
programme.desc: Discover how and why the fighter-bomber Panavia Tornado has been so useful in so many roles for so many years.

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters
programme.desc: Volunteers explore the community’s role in conservation, with thrilling honey harvesting, a new addition to the team, and a dream come true as one feeds a black rhino.

programme.title: Wildest Survival
programme.desc: The instinct to secure a mate is one of the most powerful that there is. From the beautiful to the bizarre, this episode explores the most amazing mating rituals from right across the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Today’s Top Pick
programme.desc: Documentaries in this slot are rebroadcasts of our most-viewed and most popular stories of the season. They feature important social, economic, environmental or other policy-driven issues, affecting lives nationwide or simply in one small village. A broad selection of top productions by Chinese top documentary producers.

programme.title: Humanities and Geography
programme.desc: A strand devoted to the nature and wildlife of China, the people who lived alongside them, and the great and diverse landscapes with which they all contend.

programme.title: Living China
programme.desc: Real life stories told from the personal perspective. Moving, dramatic, sorrows and joys, expressed emphatically and expressed quietly. Watch closely to see and understand the real China as it is lived.

programme.title: Special Edition
programme.desc: Prestige Chinese documentary production, tackling serious subjects with the best cinematography, editing, and all round production values with a unique Chinese perspective.

programme.title: Journeys and Discoveries
programme.desc: A documentary series showcasing the history of China and its people.

programme.title: History in the Frame
programme.desc: A documentary series featuring historical and archaeological exploration.

programme.title: Best Eats
programme.desc: Food connects people! A feast for the eyes that spotlights the cuisines of China in a way that’s bound to set the mouths of the whole globe watering!

programme.title: Youthful China
programme.desc: The youth of a country is the future of that country. A series of documentaries focusing on the younger generation of China in which you get to see what they are achieving and what makes them tick!

programme.title: Pixel Collage
programme.desc: A well-crafted collage of selected short documentaries telling stories about all aspects of China! People, technology, culture, and wildlife, all are showcased in Internet-friendly form.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Melman loses his first tooth, he fears he won't be Kate's baby anymore and goes on a city-wide chase to recover his tooth before Kate can replace him with a younger, cuter animal.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Ranger Hoof invites Marty on a Junior Ranger night trot in Central Park, Marty is determined to prove he's got what it takes to do the job- but when Alex tags along for the ride, Marty learns that "what it takes" is a whole lot of teamwork.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a new camera that takes pictures with silly filters, CatRat uses it to lead Gabby, Pandy, and the Gabby Cats on a photographic scavenger hunt around the dollhouse!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes masks and capes for her and Pandy, they become the dollhouse defenders and must save the Gabby Cats from Bad Guy CatRat! In the Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Kitty Fairy sings a song about her garden magic!

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: When the other dragons come down with the flu, Summer must overcome her fear of eels to retrieve the cure and get her friends back in the air.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Magnus hatches a plan to hide in an egg to spy on the Rescue Riders. But things get all scrambled when a mama dragon takes him to her nest.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: Sherman enters a cheerleading competition, but his attempts to get a newly formed squad ready disrupts Peabody's show about famous historical diseases.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: It's Bring Your Kids to Work Day but when the kids act up on the show, the parents must lay down the law...until the adults' parents come on the show.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: The dragon riders must sneak a very sick Magma Breather into the ICARIS infirmary.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: The Sky Torcher & Flame Throwers invade the Crystal Realm. Tom must conquer his demons and bond with the Fault Ripper to defeat the Sky Torcher.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: When Julien concocts an elaborate lie, blaming a giant "mega-gecko" for ruining a young lemur's birthday party.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: Julien finds a bag of coffee beans in the Cove of Wonders and gets the entire lemur community hooked on caffeine.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Jack Sprat steals enchanted boots from the Treasure House and triggers a dangerous Devil Wind that threatens to consume San Lorenzo's treasure.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Dulcinea pulls a magical sword from a stone and becomes enchanted with heroic powers; Puss must help her learn how to control her newfound strength.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: The Defenders of the Wing are a local island tribe, which worships dragons and believe the Riders have stolen their protector – the Eruptodon dragon.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Hiccup, Mala, Astrid, Fishlegs, and Snotlout go searching for the now captured Eruptodon, but little do they know that Viggo has a sinister plan.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When a distant cousin of the Twins named Gruffnut arrives on Dragon's Edge, Tuffnut tries to impress him, but Gruffnut may not be the hero he seems.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: While the parents are away, the kids are in charge of the tree house, but when the punch monkeys invade the house, the kids find themselves out of their element.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: Jealous of the Thunder Sisters, the men on the farm undergo a series of difficult initiation rituals to try and join the exclusive tribe of women.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: Eep loves action and adventure - it's in her blood. But when Eep starts adventuring in her sleep, she has to try to find the cause of her new sleep walking to avoid ending up in dangerous situations.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Boss and family go on Spring Break to visit his grandparents in the big city of Chicago. Boss uses the trip to test his business mettle, by getting in a promotion war at a real big adult company. And when a department store refuses to let Gigi and Tim return an item, they wind up unionizing the entire sales force.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Mom and Dad are panicking after Gigi noticed Boss isn't growing, so Boss "puts himself under", taking a special formula that will turn him int a regular baby long enough to pass a Doctor's checkup. However, with Boss gone, all the villains from this season see it as the perfect time to strike Baby Corp, leaving Staci to hold the floodgates.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Looking to trim costs, Boss unknowingly fires Boom Baby, a super-undercover Baby Corp worker who displays to parents how unsafe things are by pratfalling on them and crying for attention. Convinced he's the victim of a conspiracy, Boom leaves a wake of parent worry in his path, forcing Boss to stop him.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom and the riders help Thunder, who is seeking revenge against the dragons that chased off his family.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom hatches an unorthodox plan to use a monstrous Nightmare to test Alex’s new fire suits that endangers the secret of dragons.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: After a fight with her mom, Jun joins Tom on an adventure into the Fire Realm, where the knowledge of myths saves the day.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: There is more epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates, one of which is out for revenge against Mr. Ping! The adventures lead them to London, where they are wanted by the Knights. Old enemies resurface and Blade will have to face one of her most challenging opponents—her mom. And somehow, Po finds himself in a chess tournament against the Queen of England!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Echo and Ms. Nowhere bust Cisco, Frostee, and Gary out of their cell. But Rafaela has already mind controlled Tony and Layla and taken them to drive for her in the favela race, allowing her to release her mind control formula on the crowd!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Our team battles Rafaela’s mind-controlled crowd. They soon discover that Rafaela’s true plan is to steal the spy plane. Tony deduces that Rafaela isn’t doing all of this for the money - she’s doing it for family.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Cleve Kelso breaks Rafaela Moreno and a dangerous, cybernetic prisoner named Matsuo Mori from a high-security ice prison. Back in LA, Tony and the crew experience a major shake-up when Echo gets accepted to Ms. Nowhere’s spy training but Tony is rejected. While Tony is grappling with his identity crisis, Echo struggles to survive spy school, and Ms. Nowhere and Gary disappear in a massive North African storm during their hunt for Cleve. Echo must lead the Toretto crew and finish Ms. Nowhere’s mission – what could Cleve be up to in the desert?

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim is nominated for Spring Fling King Meanwhile Strickler brings Angor Rot to Arcadia so the Troll assassin can meet his prey.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jims quest for Gunmars birthstone sends the gang deep into the heart of a volcano that is not what it seems and Strickler seeks to protect himself.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: After the events at Gattos Keep Blinky is transformed into a human being and Jim discovers the assassin that is hunting him.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja and Krel hitch a ride in Stuart’s old UFO on a mission to rescue Vex from a bounty hunter outpost on the Moon. Meanwhile, Zadra receives intel about Morando from a surprising new ally.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: With Morando and his Armada heading for Earth, Aja and Krel clash with Vex and Zadra over how to handle the situation. Vex and Zadra want to alert human authorities, while the Royal teens seek out a more creative solution -- video games.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: The arrival of Tronos – a bounty hunter with the power to control electricity – sparks an investigation by Area 49-B that threatens to expose the Royals’ alien identities. Meanwhile, Mother watches as the Royals struggle to work together to deal with this new threat.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: The Paladins face the most epic battle yet

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Thunk invents ventriloquism when he tries (and fails) at stand-up comedy, but he gets jealous when Ahhh! Valley thinks the puppet is the real comedian/Eep is determined for two buffalippos to find love when Grug denies her dating privileges.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Eep takes up death-guarding at the watering hole, but finds out it's more mundane than she thought. Grug and Sandy get competitive when town members encroach on their treasure hunting/Gran convinces Grug that she controls the weather, but the power goes to her head when all of Ahhh! Valley believes her. Thunk tries to overcome his fear of thunderstorms.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: A swift new recruit joins the school racing team, putting Lucky's dreams of riding out front in jeopardy. Pru and Abigail clash over a class project.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: The PALs make plans for the Valentine's Day dance, then pivot to scare off a group of raiders who've come to rob the headmaster's vault.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: Garby and Click-Clack must rescue the Dinotruxafter they are tied down by a destructive tribe of Slamtools who made an evil deal with D-Structs

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Bands on the Run Casper and Jimmy form a rock band to compete in the Deedstown Battle of the Bands. Vote for Casper Mantha is angling to win the office of Class Rep, but Kibosh fancies having a fellow ghost in power.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Permission Impossible When Ra's parents refuse to let him go on the school camping trip, he sneaks away and gets lost in the Scary Woods with Casper and Mantha. What Possessed You? When a lesson in taking possession of a human body goes awry, Casper's human ends up taking possession of him!

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Rupert, Edward and Bill go camping. Rupert is excited at the idea of playing ‘explorers' but as darkness falls the friends are frightened by strange shadows and noises.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Raggety is getting the wood tidy for the annual visit of the Spring Inspector. If it's not looking its best, Spring won't go ahead and Raggety needs help from Rupert and his friends

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Chef J tells Ollie he cooks with love. Kelp and Ollie set out to make food with love for him. When various food combos fail, Ollie considers giving up, because it isn’t good enough. Kelp goes to his Dad for answers, and two seemingly different ingredients form something magical. / When Cruz is not his usual upbeat self, Kelp tries various ways to cheer him up before realizing the best way to be a good friend is to just sit with him, and let him feel what he’s feeling.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop pet-sit Crabby, who acts out until they realize he’s missing home. / Kelp feels like he can’t choose between a celebration on land or under the sea. So he attempts to do both... at the same time!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby brings DJ Catnip a microphone for him to use in the big music show, but he has some terrible news: he lost his groove! Determined to help him get his groove back, Gabby and Pandy take him on a musical search through the dollhouse. As they go, Gabby uses the microphone to record sounds from the Gabby Cats’ everyday activities that culminate into a new song that gets DJ his groove back just in time for the show! In our Gabby Cat of the Day Segment, Gabby sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a recipe for dandelion soup and a soup bowl, she discovers Kitty Fairy is sick! Gabby and Pandy make her some delicious dandelion soup and while she rests, they take care of her Garden. With the help of all the Gabby Cats, they water the Singing Flowers, help the Rainbow Kitty Bushes regain their color, and sing some fussy Itty Bitty Blossoms a lullaby. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Kitty Fairy sings a song!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Gloria becomes determined to earn her Queen of Kindness Kidizen badge and welcomes some free-spirited rats who need a place to stay into the habitat. Despite her discomfort, Gloria encourages the rats to make themselves at home. When the rats play with her special baby tusk at the bottom of her tank, she finally snaps and sends the rats home. It isn't until the gang winds up at the rats' nest and Gloria almost takes a slice of the rats special cheese that she learns it's okay to say no.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Alex realizes he’s too small to climb onto his new habitat “stage”, he feels too small for his dreams- until he hears of a big, new roller coaster at Coney Island and figures if he can ride the big coaster, that’ll prove that he’s a BIG deal! But when Alex is too short to be allowed on the ride- and his friends find themselves stuck at the top of it- Alex saves the day when he realizes that there are advantages to being small, and learns that his body is perfect just the way it is.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Rodney accidentally catches Sam when she falls from a tree and starts to believe he’s a hero TZG secretly follow him around town to make sure his clumsy hero-ing doesn’t go wrong. / When Lula and Luis want a clubhouse for the Squasher Fan Club, TZG secretly help fix up the shed in Luis’ backyard.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When various townsfolk report having lost soft belongings, TZG secretly investigates to discover thieving pigeon Yolanda had been building a nest for baby gophers. / When Ian’s lucky badminton racket goes missing, TZG secretly finds and returns it in time for a rematch against his toughest opponent.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: During the Lunar New Year festival, Alex is bummed to learn that there's no Year of the Lion. programme.title: Robin Hood

programme.title: Shaolin Vs. Evil Dead 2: Ultimate Power
programme.desc: A kung fu fighter’s Taoist priest friend has turned into a vampire, hell-bent on leading his legion of vampires to bring eternal darkness to the nation.

programme.title: Total Recall (1990)
programme.desc: In 2084, construction worker Douglas Quaid visits Rekall for a virtual Mars vacation—but the procedure unlocks hidden memories, thrusting him into a deadly rebellion and a secret-agent past.

programme.title: Tai Chi Master
programme.desc: Two friends, ex Shaolin monks, part ways as they brush with the ongoing rebellion against the government. The ambitious one rises up to be a powerful military commander, while his betrayed friend resorts to learn the calm ways of Tai Chi.

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Pierce Brosnan stars in Dante’s Peak, where a quiet town faces fiery doom from a reawakening volcano. Explosive action and suspense make this disaster thriller a must-see ride!

programme.title: Cape Fear
programme.desc: In Cape Fear, Robert De Niro plays a vengeful ex-con stalking his former lawyer, played by Nick Nolte. Directed by Martin Scorsese, this suspense-filled thriller is a chilling classic remake.

programme.title: Vampire Wars: Battle For The Universe
programme.desc: In 2210, a crew dispatched to rescue humans from a vampire attack discovers that the vampires are plotting a take-over…and getting help from a surprising source.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood

programme.title: Death Ring

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: In Waterworld, Kevin Costner stars as a lone maverick in a flooded future Earth, protecting a mother and daughter from a tribe of ruthless nomads. Dennis Hopper delivers a memorable villainous performance in this thrilling adventure.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In Oblivion, Tom Cruise stars as a man on a journey of redemption in a future Earth. Directed by the creator of *TRON: Legacy*, it’s a visually stunning sci-fi adventure about confronting the past to save humanity.

programme.title: Around China
programme.desc: From an inAprative perspective that touches on human cultures through the exploration of a wide range of cultures with distinctive local features

programme.title: Nostalgia
programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling. In this show, the audience can enjoy the natural and cultural backgrounds of Chinese traditional villages, and will find their knowledge of this oriental country expand through the interviews of Chinese people overseas whose memory and nostalgia can also reveal the very core value of the Chinese traditional culture.

programme.title: Across the Strait
programme.desc: The Across the Strait traces the much-discussed issues across the Strait, reflects the will of the citizens on two sides of the Strait and details the Chinese Government’s policy of “one country, two systems” in a bid to enhance the Taiwan fellowmen’s understanding of the Mainland China.

programme.title: Pearl in Red
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: A Graceful Liar
programme.desc: A bold yet heartbreaking story of a mother and daughter-in-law who meet through marriage and wage a war of lies to seize the Geonhyang family, struggling for a dramatic reversal of fortune.

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: Round Playlist
programme.desc: The program is intended to promote exchanges between Korea and ASEAN countries by utilizing popular music.

programme.title: Hometown Heroes : Baseball
programme.desc: Four legendary Korean professional baseball players take on a new challenge as coaches of U-10 youth baseball teams. They may be masters of the game, but as coaches, they are complete rookies starting from zero. As each legend leads a team representing his former club's home region, a fierce battle for local pride begins.

programme.title: Dear.M
programme.desc: A pure, no-filter youth romance drama unraveling a pink-hued mystery as they search for ‘M', the protagonist behind the love letter that turned Seoyeon University upside down.

programme.title: Jang Youngsil: The Greatest Scientist of Joseon
programme.desc: The drama is the first 'historic science' drama that has been produced in Korea. This drama depicts the successful life story of the scientist Jang Youngsil that contributed to the development and accomplishment of Joseon's science during the 15th century. In particular, the drama emphasizes his accomplishment through showing the restrictions and difficulties he experienced due to his social class as a slave. Moreover, the drama aims to depict Jang Youngsil as the role model of 'Korea's youth of the 21st century' through displaying his scientific accomplishments. The drama also expects to stimulate scientific curiosity amongst audiences and help them easily understand the fundamental principles of science by utilizing various data and scientific videos.

programme.title: Noona, You Are A Woman To Me
programme.desc: Age is just a number—attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Fong Sai-Yuk, Return of Heroes
programme.desc: After Fong Sai-Yuk’s adoptive father is murdered by traitors of the Red Flower Society, he vows to hunt them down and avenge his death. Driven by grief and loyalty, he rises against the conspirators in a ruthless fight for justice.

programme.title: Wusong VS Ximenqing
programme.desc: Wu Song finds out about his sister-in-law’s affair with a rich man, Ximen Qing. Qing sets Song up and have him exiled for a year, during which his hapless brother is murdered and cremated. When Song finally returns home, he takes the case to court but the judge brushes it aside and closes it abruptly. Can Song finally avenge his brother’s death?

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. programme.title: Fierce Cop
programme.desc: To save his son who has been kidnapped by human traffickers, police officer Zhang relentlessly hunts them down and accidentally finds himself implicated in a major child abduction case. In the process, he teams up with a mysterious lady to crack the international crime syndicate and rescue his son.

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Join Indonesian famous models Patricia and Chika as they explore the city's hidden gems and vibrant scenes, immersing themselves in amazing contrasts and trendy vibes.

programme.title: Robot Apocalypse
programme.desc: When expert hacker Tara tries to stop a powerful and sentient A.I. from taking over the world's military, the A.I. marks her as a terrorist who must be exterminated…

It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Blind War
programme.desc: Former SWAT captain Dong Gu suffers traumatic visual loss during a failed mission for which he is forced to take responsibility. He manages to get over and adapt to the situation with his daughter’s company, until his nemesis appears and puts his daughter in danger. Despite being blind, Dong Gu must fight to save his daughter.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1)
programme.desc: Pigs in a blanket are the quintessential party finger food. The problem is, you can never eat just one! These full-sized hotdogs wrapped in soft challah are the perfect solution.

programme.title: A Nurse To Die For
programme.desc: A father hires a live-in nurse to help care for his sick daughter, however, as she suffers a series of setbacks, he starts to wonder if the nurse might actually be the one keeping her sick.

programme.title: Secrets In The Desert
programme.desc: A romantic road trip turns into a woman's desperate search for answers when the car she and her boyfriend are driving breaks down in a creepy backwater town. Then the boyfriend vanishes.

programme.title: Got To Leave Something
programme.desc: They meet the finest biker of Jiri Mountain, a poet who fled city life to live in the mountains. From this poet, who captures photos of stars and flowers, the two actors learn poetry.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: Today contestants must utilise an air fryer to bring the judges a dish worthy of the Top 10. The winner will score a $5,000 Harvey Norman voucher to help deck out their kitchen.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: The bottom three cooks from yesterday’s Mystery Box must now fight to save their spot in the competition. Today’s Pressure Test is set by award-winning pastry chef and culinary innovator Philip Khoury.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: The top nine contestants compete across two rounds for a chance at winning immunity. In Round 1, contestants are split into three teams of three and must choose their champ to represent the team.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S2)
programme.desc: Rachael shows us how to make a beautiful, quick-cooking white ragu sauce that she'll serve over ribbony pappardelle pasta, cooked al dente style.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S2)
programme.desc: Semi-dried tomatoes are a new staple in American grocery stores. Rachael demonstrates how to use them as the star in her recipe for a pesto paired with broccolini and served with sausage.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Sometimes the best meals are kept locked behind closed doors, but in this episode host Michael Yo has the keys to some of the most special and secret dining spaces around.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6)
programme.desc: Duke stumbles upon a potential diamond in the rough estate sale. The team ventures out to discover the house that sits on an overgrown jungle of a yard, where a detached unit is hidden among the weeds.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays
programme.desc: Impress your holiday guests with a classic cheesy fondue party! Rachael shows how to make her version of an easy and decadent "Fundue" that is sure to bring everyone around to celebrate the holidays.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3)

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine

programme.desc: Allied air forces engage in a ferocious and costly battle with the German Luftwaffe over the skies of Europe.

programme.title: Lost U-Boats Of WWII
programme.desc: With weather preventing Darrell Miklos and the team from diving from the boat, they attempt a risky strategy. Garth makes a solo journey to explore a deserted island where he discovers a mysterious cross.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2)
programme.desc: The team investigates a large wooden shipwreck that could be one of the Bermuda Triangle area's earliest victims: the long-lost SS D.H. Mount.

programme.title: Swamp People (S14)
programme.desc: Daniel and Dorien call in air support. Meanwhile, Ronnie and Ashley compete in a battle of the sexes. Black Rambo hunts for a legendary payday. While Bruce tries to save his season.

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: Against all odds, Disney turns 27,000 acres of muddy Florida swampland into the world's largest and most visited theme park.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: Allied air forces engage in a ferocious and costly battle with the German Luftwaffe over the skies of Europe.

programme.title: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler (S1)
programme.desc: You thought your job was tough? Uncover the dangerous gigs of the past – from mercury-poisoned hat makers to kids crawling through chimneys – and imagine the risks behind everyday jobs of old.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: The Allies hope to quickly penetrate the Nazi Reich via Italy but instead endure a months-long slog with devastating results.

programme.title: Hidden Cities (S2)
programme.desc: 8 powerful kingdoms and 51 kings. Find out how she succeeded in being the only Southeast Asian country to remain independent throughout her history.

programme.desc: King Arthur. England's first pop culture superhero, his exploits have inspired numerous blockbuster movies and television series.

programme.desc: As gator season enters its final week, Troy attempts to train the next generation of Landry hunters. Ronnie calls upon Timmy's knowledge of secret honey holes to catch up on his tag count.

programme.desc: Imagine free falling 30,000 feet without a parachute, or being buried alive and living to tell the tale. Or... what about getting trapped in a tiny room inside a sunken ship on the ocean floor...

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S12)
programme.desc: The Fellowship believes more than ever that they are finally zeroing in on treasure when they discover Oak Logs which may be part of the legendary platforms leading them to the Money Pit.

programme.title: Secrets Declassified With David Duchovny (S1)
programme.desc: While wars may be won by men, they're fought with weapons. Teetering between the apocalyptic and absurd, declassified records will unveil the secret weapons programs that attempted to bring down the world.

programme.desc: Mike braves icy waters to catch snow crabs living on the seafloor hundreds of feet below; Bret and Ivy travel uncharted terrain to create a new trail and build a log bridge to cross a deep creek.

programme.title: The Heroic Ones
programme.desc: Set in the Tang Dynasty, the 13 adopted sons of Sha Tuo King are all renowned as royal warriors. David Chiang plays the 13th Prince, a powerful fighter whose prestigious status provokes jealously, leading to a gruesome family feud.

programme.title: Kid From Kwangtung
programme.desc: Qing enforcer Luo Yi Hu murders rebel Chen Gui, forcing his wife and daughter Xiao Wei to flee to Guang Long Town. There, mischievous Jia Yu discovers his master’s identity as a rebel while helping Xiao Wei. After his loved ones and mentor are killed, Jia Yu sheds his playful ways and seeks vengeance, facing the Qing forces in a final battle.

programme.title: Killer Clans
programme.desc: This intriguing wuxia saga is packed with conspiracies, power schemes and sword fights to produce a perfect blend of great action and gripping drama. The movie centres around the struggle for underworld supremacy between two clans, where the line between good and evil is not always that clear-cut.

programme.title: The Shaolin Avengers
programme.desc: Hu seeks to avenge his father who is being killed by the White-Browed Hermit and his gang. However, he fails in his attempt and is saved by Fang Shi Yu, a youth from Shaolin whose parents are also killed by the same villains. They learn and master the advanced Shaolin style kung fu, before Fang leads Hu and the Shaolin fellows to fight the enemies.

programme.title: The Invincible Fist
programme.desc: A dedicated chief constable nicknamed “The Invincible Fist” is chasing after a band of bandits near a village one day and encounters an innocent blind girl. He quickly falls in love with her, but finds out she is the daughter of a vicious bandit. Will he kill the father of his lover?

programme.title: Shark Busters
programme.desc: During the financial crisis, a vast majority of Hong Kong people experience difficulties in repaying debts. During this time, loan sharks use ruthless ways to force debtors to repay their loans and it is up to Officer Lee and his underground team to hunt down the head of this illegal organization.

programme.title: Cop Shop Babes
programme.desc: Island East Police Station headed by Madam Lui is known for its “Cop Shop Babes” as all the officers there are female. Two police officers, Beer and Satay, apply for an internal transfer to this station in order to approach the girls. It is at this time that the police receives a bomb threat – can they resolve the case?

programme.title: A Cool Fish 2
programme.desc: Scoundrel Chen San Jin and the ruthless Xue Fang Mei, who parted ways on the streets of Bangkok, are unexpectedly drawn into a kidnapping scheme by a criminal syndicate. As danger escalates and tensions flare, they must navigate betrayal and chaos. Can they survive the ordeal together?

programme.title: The New One-Armed Swordsman
programme.desc: David Chiang plays the all-new one-armed hero - a swordsman who chops off his right arm rather than live with dishonour. When the love of his life is kidnapped and his best friend is murdered by the evil gang, it is time to battle.

programme.title: Intimate Confessions of a Chinese Courtesan
programme.desc: Young Ai Nu is abducted and sold to the popular Four Seasons brothel run by the powerful and ruthless Madam Chun Yi. Ai Nu gets locked up in a dungeon due to her fiery attitude. Soon, a murder occurs within the brothel and a policeman must race against time to prevent a vicious revenge plot from reaching its blood-spattered conclusion.

programme.title: Detrimental
programme.desc: You Ji Ren is a blind man who works at a factory on an outlying island. When the factory is cut off from the outside world by a hurricane one day, a monster appears and turns whoever sees it into black shadows. As You cannot see the monster, he is able to help his other co-workers escape safely and fight to kill the monster.

programme.title: Life Must Go On
programme.desc: When the “midnight gymnasium” programme for wayward teenage girls is at funding risk, social worker Yanki puts together a dodgeball team to compete in a match and save it. With an ex-star athlete John as the coach, the girls realize they must face their problems and overcome their challenges instead of dodging them. Can they finally win the match?

programme.title: My First of May
programme.desc: Former squash champion Teng and his wife face devastating trials when their daughter is diagnosed with muscular dystrophy and his mother with cancer. Years later, as the family struggles between holding on and letting go, they find a new connection through a small but powerful sign of hope: the faint movement of their daughter’s pinky finger.

programme.title: The Bullet Vanishes
programme.desc: A series of murders at a munitions factory sparks fear of a “Phantom Bullet” that kills without a trace. Detective Song Dong Lu and sharpshooter Guo Zhui are tasked with solving the case. As they uncover layers of corruption and conspiracy, they are drawn into a deadly game where the truth is more dangerous than the bullets.

programme.title: 7-Man Army
programme.desc: This iconoclastic film retells the legend of seven Chinese patriots, who sacrificed their lives to defend against 20,000 Japanese soldiers and 50 tanks for 5 days, at a strategic key point of the Great Wall known as Pa Tou Lou Tzu.

programme.desc: Mongolia's culture of meat-eating is contributing to health problems in this developing economy. Chef Suzuki Yuko aims to introduce more vegetables through workshops and improved hospital menus.

programme.title: Dive in Tokyo
programme.desc: Kasai is a bayside town in eastern Tokyo bounded by two large rivers. Join us as we trace its history as a hub of water transport, go river fishing, and get to know the local Indian community.

programme.title: NHK News 7
programme.desc: NEWS 7 is NHK's flagship domestic evening news program, bringing you the latest from our Tokyo studio. It's presented with English audio on NHK World for our international viewers.

programme.title: Bosai: Lava Flows
programme.desc: The hazard map for Mt. Fuji was revised in 2021, revealing the possibility of greater damage from lava flows. We'll look at what lies behind those assumptions and what countermeasures can be taken.

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: The entire Earth is affected by climate change, occurring with a greater speed and scale than ever before. This program uses scientific data and the latest findings to raise awareness on its impact.

programme.title: Time-lapse Japan
programme.desc: Matsue is known as the "city of water." It is home to Lake Shinji, which is famous for its shijimi clams. Through beautiful time-lapse footage, we see the lake's changing colors and expressions.

programme.title: NewsRoom Tokyo
programme.desc: NEWSROOM TOKYO dives deeper into the day's news with insight and analysis, from the perspective of Japan and the rest of Asia. We put a spotlight on what you need to know to understand the issues.

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: Ito Junji is a horror manga artist renowned worldwide for his intricate artwork and unique vision, which earned him a place in the prestigious Eisner Awards Hall of Fame in 2025. What inspires him?

programme.title: A Culture Built with Wood Hida
programme.desc: The Hida region in Gifu Prefecture has some of Japan's most extensive broadleaf forests and has been home to artisans who possess sophisticated woodworking skills, such as kigumi or wood joinery.

programme.title: Ramen Japan 5min.
programme.desc: A whirlwind tour of Hokkaido's best ramen! Why not whet your appetite with the origin story of Sapporo miso ramen?

programme.title: Ukiyoe Edo-Life: Takinogawa River
programme.desc: We travel to a well-known tourist resort just outside of Edo, where day-trippers are enjoying river recreation and forest walks, praying at local shrines, and sitting down for riverside picnics.

programme.title: Ramen Japan 5min.
programme.desc: In Hakodate, ramen is salt or shio-style! Enjoy a delicious bowl of ramen that carries on the tradition.

programme.title: Ukiyoe Edo-Life: Airing Laundry
programme.desc: It's summer, and a group of women have gathered at the local well to do laundry in the shade. We learn about the different techniques and tools they used to wash and dry different types of kimonos.

programme.title: Core Kyoto
programme.desc: Many artisan-customer relationships in Kyoto span generations, boasting strong bonds of trust. Top-quality products are created through constructive communication between the artisan and the customer.

programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.title: Japanology Plus
programme.desc: The 19th-century educator Yoshida Shoin lived only 29 years, yet his teachings helped shape Japan's modernization. His words, published as books, remain popular today. We visit his birthplace, Hagi.

programme.title: 48 Hours in Chongqing
programme.desc: Mark Wiens has 48 hours to eat his way through Chongqing, the spicy food capital of China!

programme.title: Hong Kong Gourmet with Justine Schofield (S1)
programme.desc: Join Justine as she dives into Hong Kong's colorful culinary scene, where East meets West.

programme.title: At Home with Phol (S1)
programme.desc: As a passionate Thai cook, Phol strives to preserve traditional Thai cooking, which is clearly evident in this episode.

programme.title: At Home with Phol (S1)
programme.desc: In this episode, join Phol as he gives his own modern interpretation of four favorite Thai dishes.

programme.title: May's Kitchen (S2)
programme.desc: May is always trying to give not only recipes but also changing how people look at cooking, making it fun and relatable.

programme.title: Secrets of the Curry Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Asma Khan celebrates the joy of street food, featuring chicken momos, potato and sweetcorn patties, lamb ‘jali’ kabab and paneer skewers.

programme.title: Secrets of the Curry Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Asma loves cooking Bengali influenced food. On the menu is her mother’s prawn malaikari, an omelette curry, a rich fish curry, and a coconut dessert.

programme.title: The Cook Up with Adam Liaw (S4)
programme.desc: Adam is joined in The Cook Up kitchen by chefs Tom Walton and Brent Savage to take ordinary recipes and make them extraordinary.

programme.title: The Cook Up with Adam Liaw (S4)
programme.desc: We're making fiery food and making it fast! Content strategist Nina Huynh and chef Luke Burgess join Adam in The Cook Up kitchen to turn up the heat.

programme.title: Go Where Hunan Abounds (S3)
programme.desc: Changsha auditions for the Barbecue Competition with Mawangdui Han-Style BBQ Set Meal, "With You for a Lifetime" BBQ Set Meal, Butanbai BBQ Set, and more.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet (S12)
programme.desc: Justine Schofield inspires home cooks to get more out of their kitchen by simplifying gourmet food.

programme.desc: After harvesting the prized Gulf Apong in a Noah palm rainforest, Audra travels to Miri - Sarawak's second biggest city and its most modern.

programme.title: Eat Roam Relish (S1)
programme.desc: Audra's final days in the highlands takes her to the coffee farms of Long Banga and the spiritual ascent of Prayer Mountain.

programme.title: French Gourmet with Justine Schofield (S1)
programme.desc: Embark on a culinary adventure through Southern France with renowned cook Justine Scholfield in 'French Gourmet.'

programme.title: Cha Chaan Teng (S1)
programme.desc: Hong Kong is known for its East-meets-West heritage, and Cha Chaan Teng is the essence of the unique history.

programme.title: Container Wars S2 10
programme.desc: The biggest auction on the planet sails to the middle of the Pacific Ocean when a mysterious container is dredged up from the bottom of the sea. Royal rumors spark golden expectations, but how could have any of the waterlogged loot survived?

programme.title: Container Wars S3 1
programme.desc: The bidders are back and the competition is fiercer than ever! Mo & Ty set their sights on a container from Mexico, but could everything inside be damaged goods? The Israelis pin their hopes on a mysterious wooden crate, and bids go through the roof on a one-of-a-kind open-air container.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 1
programme.desc: Old rivals unite when Brandon and Jesse are faced with the unthinkable: join forces or stand alone to gamble on a once-in-a-lifetime locker. Then, a vintage motorcycle and rare car parts create big cash for one of our slickest auction heroes. And later, the Taylor Brothers are in for the fight of their lives when they leave the Deep South for the promise of California gold. It's an old-world battle that could lead to a new world order.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S7 01
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q take their talents to Miami for the season premiere, pulling all new pranks on the beach. The guys zip around in scooters controlled by the other Jokers, and the loser will come face-to-face with an alligator.

programme.title: Smallville S1 18
programme.desc: Clark seeks election as class president, hoping for the opportunity to be a normal kid.

programme.title: ER S2 21
programme.desc: Hathaway testifies about Shep's behavior. Jeanie's husband thinks that he may have the flu, but tests reveal that Al is HIV positive. Lewis seeks the help of a therapist.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 19
programme.desc: Sheldon gets quite a surprise when he visits his mom in Houston, while Raj's "Murder Mystery" party causes tension within the gang.

programme.title: Friends S8 22
programme.desc: Rachel's pregnancy goes beyond her projected delivery date.

programme.desc: Approaching Fleet Week inspires the Direstas to hunt for some salable military gems. In order to make any flea market profits the guys will have to live by the mantra, "Buy low, sell high and modify."

programme.desc: A gang of extreme jumpers nets the Direstas a commissioned Harley-inspired pogo stick sale.

programme.title: Container Wars S2 10
programme.desc: The biggest auction on the planet sails to the middle of the Pacific Ocean when a mysterious container is dredged up from the bottom of the sea. Royal rumors spark golden expectations, but how could have any of the waterlogged loot survived?

programme.title: Container Wars S3 1
programme.desc: The bidders are back and the competition is fiercer than ever! Mo & Ty set their sights on a container from Mexico, but could everything inside be damaged goods? The Israelis pin their hopes on a mysterious wooden crate, and bids go through the roof on a one-of-a-kind open-air container.

programme.desc: Kevin and Brooke search for the ultimate lipstick hack, explore beeswax as a waterproofing technique, and welcome an old tire into the All-Star Club. Plus, this week's "Hack Master" will go to the extreme by hacking Kevin's brain.

programme.title: Hack My Life S2 06
programme.desc: Kevin and Brooke put the best shaving hacks to the test in the ultimate beard-off, and find out if using a drill to eat corn is hack or wack. Plus, they'll welcome toothpaste into the All-Star Club and use pencil lead to make a light bulb.

programme.title: Smallville S1 18
programme.desc: Clark seeks election as class president, hoping for the opportunity to be a normal kid.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 01
programme.desc: Michael breezes into the Windy City to shock and amaze the Chicago locals. In a health store, he sells a supplement that proves you are what you drink, and at a Metro station, he utterly derails a commuter's sense of reality.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 02
programme.desc: In a local Chicago diner, Michael brings new meaning to the term "hold the pickles." Plus, he discovers an aggressive new breed of fungus at a park, and later, he helps a coworker disappear from work early in a hospital warehouse.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 20
programme.desc: While Penny and Raj face difficult life decisions, Amy helps Sheldon through the even greater hell of choosing a new gaming system.

programme.title: Friends S8 23
programme.desc: In the one-hour season finale, Rachel waits in the hospital maternity ward.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 1
programme.desc: Old rivals unite when Brandon and Jesse are faced with the unthinkable: join forces or stand alone to gamble on a once-in-a-lifetime locker. Then, a vintage motorcycle and rare car parts create big cash for one of our slickest auction heroes. And later, the Taylor Brothers are in for the fight of their lives when they leave the Deep South for the promise of California gold. It's an old-world battle that could lead to a new world order.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S7 01
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q take their talents to Miami for the season premiere, pulling all new pranks on the beach. The guys zip around in scooters controlled by the other Jokers, and the loser will come face-to-face with an alligator.

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: A man (Ewan McGregor) living in a futuristic sterile colony begins to question his circumscribed existence when his friend (Scarlett Johansson) is chosen to go to the Island – reportedly the last uncontaminated place on earth.

programme.title: The Notebook
programme.desc:
Behind every great love is a great story.
In Seabrook, South Carolina in the 1940s, teenaged debutante Allie Hamilton and local boy Noah Calhoun spend one passionate, carefree summer together and deeply in love. But when the summer ends, war and duty separate the young couple.
Today, an elderly man visits a nursing home to read from his notebook to a woman whose memory is fading. As he spins a tale of two young lovers with their whole lives before them, his beloved Allie relives a long-ago passion that has never died, an unbreakable bond between two ordinary people rendered extraordinary by the strength, power and beauty of true love.
Based on the novel by Nicholas Sparks, author of A Walk to Remember and Message in a Bottle.

programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin discover the best hacks for stretching out shoes and removing coffee stains. Plus, they'll welcome hangers into the All Star Club, explore the most delicious hack from history, and meet the newest Hack Hero.

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: As the AFL pushes for growth, we uncover new evidence of brain disease in younger players. Families of players diagnosed with CTE speak about the risks of repeated head trauma. Has the AFL been transparent about the risks?

programme.title: Media Watch
programme.desc: Karl Stefanovic loses his job after embracing a controversial anti-Islam activist. ABC rejects an opinion piece by business woman Sall Grover. CCP propaganda finds its way into regional newspapers, in a branded opinion piece.

programme.title: Dr Karl's How Things Work
programme.desc: In this peep behind Bega's factory doors, Dr Karl learns how cheese is made... and it would appear that he knows more about String Theory, than he does string cheese. (Final)

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Husband and wife architects Gaurav and Vish design a multigenerational home for their aging parents and young children, entirely clad in over 9000 terracotta tiles.

programme.title: Movin' To The Country
programme.desc: On SA's Limestone Coast, Craig heads to a non-conformist winery, Kristy meets a couple who traded in a life of luxury yachts to hang out with camels and Halina explores a clever approach to tackling plastic waste.

programme.title: Magic and the Brain: The Science of Illusion - A Catalyst Special
programme.desc: Lily Serna explores the strange world of sensory perception, using magic and illusions to reveal the difference between how we perceive the world - and reality.

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien
programme.desc: Joe O'Brien brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw
programme.desc: You're invited to the final night of Refugee Week celebrations, as Adam, advocate Abang Anade Othow and cooking instructor Nige Sithirasegaram have friends for dinner.

programme.title: Play On
programme.desc: Migrant families and athletes of multicultural heritage are changing Australia's sporting culture. From social sport to elite athletes, Paul Kennedy examines how sport helps build community, identity and opportunity.

programme.title: That Pacific Sports Show
programme.desc: Sam Wykes and Tinirau Arona chat with rising Wests Tigers star Dawn Tui and NRLW player Kiana Takairangi. Plus Tiana interviews veteran weightlifter Jenly Wini, and Vanuatu Rugby League returns to the international stage.

programme.title: ABC National News
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you the day's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Joe O'Brien.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Bondi Rescue follows the work of the elite professional lifeguards who patrol Australia's busiest beach.

programme.title: Ambulance Australia

programme.title: The Tourist
programme.desc: Revolves around Frank, an American tourist visiting Italy to mend a broken heart. Elise is an extraordinary woman who deliberately crosses his path.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 3
programme.desc: In the biggest and most awesome Kung Fu Panda movie yet, Po must train a village of fun-loving, clumsy pandas to defeat a supernatural villain that threatens to destroy Kung Fu.

programme.title: The Dark Knight
programme.desc: When a menace known as the Joker wreaks havoc and chaos on the people of Gotham, Batman, James Gordon and Harvey Dent must work together to put an end to the madness.

programme.desc: A brutally realistic tour de force chronicling the conflict between a corrupt labor boss and a crusading Catholic priest.

programme.title: Endless Love
programme.desc: A young girl encounters a novelist in a bar and quickly falls in love with him. However, it turns out she has fallen into a trap set up by the novelist and his ex-girlfriend who is a ghost with a disfigured face. The journey of revenge and ultimate terror has just begun!

programme.title: Anak Perjanjian Syaitan 2
programme.desc: Haunted since childhood, orphan Azlinda believes her torment stems from her parents' dark history. Her friends Zurina, Wati, and Ustaz join forces to end her suffering, but a malevolent demon interrupts their efforts. Will Azlinda succeed in severing the cursed ties that bind her, or is she destined to remain trapped in darkness forever?

programme.title: A Sealed Book
programme.desc: The world descends into darkness when a sealed book, said to command the forces of the universe, is unearthed in an underground palace in the desert. As adventurers race to claim its power, the palace gates open, unleashing an unseen terror and heralding a catastrophe beyond imagination.

programme.title: Hide & Seek
programme.desc: Thirteen years after an explosion in an abandoned building killed their friend Noo Aon, Tong and his group return to the site—now their university campus. When a girl who looks exactly like Noo Aon appears, a childhood game turns into a lethal ritual. One by one, the friends are hunted by a vengeful spirit determined to settle a long-overdue score.

programme.title: Apartment 212
programme.desc: Escaping an abusive past, Jennifer moves into Apartment 212 for a fresh start, only to wake each day with painful bite marks. She soon discovers an ancient parasite that feeds on human flesh lurking within the walls. As attacks intensify, she must confront a nightmare more terrifying than her past before it consumes her.

programme.title: Endless Love
programme.desc: A young girl encounters a novelist in a bar and quickly falls in love with him. However, it turns out she has fallen into a trap set up by the novelist and his ex-girlfriend who is a ghost with a disfigured face. The journey of revenge and ultimate terror has just begun!

programme.title: Anak Perjanjian Syaitan 2
programme.desc: Haunted since childhood, orphan Azlinda believes her torment stems from her parents' dark history. Her friends Zurina, Wati, and Ustaz join forces to end her suffering, but a malevolent demon interrupts their efforts. Will Azlinda succeed in severing the cursed ties that bind her, or is she destined to remain trapped in darkness forever?

programme.title: The Spore
programme.desc: Global warming has awakened a malevolent spore from beneath an ancient ice field, unleashing a horrific plague that ravages humanity. Fleeing the chaos, Meadow takes refuge in an abandoned cabin. Together with other strangers, she fights to survive as some succumb to the plague, transforming into ravenous hunters who now stalk the living.

programme.title: Open the Coffin
programme.desc: Ghost Hand and his tomb raiders resurface in Jiang City to seek gold in ancient tombs after a 3-year absence. They released an evil spirit from a coffin and all four died at home eventually. Poison and pinholes in the corpses become the sole clue for police investigation. A tomb raid now unfolds as a perplexing and mysterious case.

programme.title: Guns of Eden
programme.desc: During a camping trip deep in the mountains, former Buffalo cop Megan and her friends stumble upon the local sheriff unlawfully executing a drug trafficker. Spotted and marked for death, they find every escape route sealed. To cover up his crime, the sheriff summons an armed militia to hunt them down—triggering a deadly chase with no way out.

programme.title: Detective Dee's Seven Deadly Sin
programme.desc: Detective Dee becomes embroiled in a series of murders that shake the Tang Empire. The killer invokes the "Seven Deadly Sins" to justify a twisted sense of justice. In his relentless pursuit of the truth, Detective Dee uncovers the mask of false righteousness and exposes the darkness hidden beneath.

programme.title: An Unquiet Grave
programme.desc: A year after Jamie's wife tragically died in a car accident, he persuades her sister, Ava, to accompany him to the accident site to perform a peculiar ritual. As the night progresses, it becomes evident that Jamie harbours sinister motives.

programme.title: The Spore
programme.desc: Global warming has awakened a malevolent spore from beneath an ancient ice field, unleashing a horrific plague that ravages humanity. Fleeing the chaos, Meadow takes refuge in an abandoned cabin. Together with other strangers, she fights to survive as some succumb to the plague, transforming into ravenous hunters who now stalk the living.

In his relentless pursuit of the truth, Detective Dee uncovers the mask of false righteousness and exposes the darkness hidden beneath.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: 26-year-old Timothy 'Rambo' Ramsey is killed in a drive-by shooting, but the investigation yields little evidence, and the case goes cold for six years.

programme.title: Women On Death Row
programme.desc: In 2009, Emilia Carr and her boyfriend Joshua Fulgham were convicted for the first-degree murder and kidnapping of Heather Strong, and Emilia alone was sentenced to death.

programme.title: Women On Death Row
programme.desc: Linda Carty was sentenced to death on February 19, 2001 for the kidnapping of three-day-old newborn Ray Cabrera, and the kidnapping and murder of his mother, Joana Rodriguez.

programme.title: Malaysian Drug Mules
programme.desc: Follow the Royal Malaysian Police as they go in pursuit of sinister Nigerian gangs who deceive or coerce hundreds of Malaysian women into smuggling drugs.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country. A suspect crashes into a jail; a woman has too much fun at the movies; a vandal wreaks havoc at a winery; and more!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: an innocent woman insists on going to jail with her arrested BFF; a thief absconds with a giant life-size stick figure; and more!

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: Residents of Robeson, Pennsylvania were stunned when Ashley Kline went missing on New Year's Eve. The 12-day search turned up several suspects until investigators uncovered suspicious text messages.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S1)
programme.desc: A first-timer is arrested for reckless driving while on the way to vacation, and a man is brought in on a brandishing a firearm charge while open-carrying in Virginia Beach.

programme.title: The Garden City Butcher
programme.desc: Passing himself off as a friendly tourist in Singapore, he preyed on unsuspecting travellers, bludgeoning them to death before disposing their chopped up bodies.

programme.title: Murder At The Motel
programme.desc: August 29, 2006, Riverside County, CA. Deputies from the Riverside County Sheriff's Department respond to the scene of an abandoned vehicle in a remote area of the Gavilan Hills.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou
programme.desc: When a young mother, Selonia Reed, 26, is found brutally murdered in her car, detectives turn over every rock in small-town Hammond, Louisiana, in search of her killer.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: A defendant strips naked and shadowboxes during his hearing; the family of a murder victim attacks the defendant in court; a convicted gunman begs for forgiveness from a victim's family; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: A grieving uncle screams at his sister-in-law in court over his missing nephew; an autoworker checks in to his virtual hearing from the assembly line; a road rage killer blames his victim; and more.

programme.title: First Blood (S1)
programme.desc: African-American women in the Mt Pleasant neighbourhood of Cleveland were vanishing. Their families cried for help, but no one knew what was happening. No one except Anthony Sowell.

programme.title: Ozark Law (S1)
programme.desc: As summer rolls on, the police officers try to keep the Lake of the Ozarks community safe. Detective Sergeant Mark Kordula gets called to the aid of a bloodied and concussed bar patron lying in the road.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S16)
programme.desc: In Tulsa, two men are murdered in a parking lot, but a gun from another shooting incident leads detectives to their suspect. As prosecutors prepare for the trial, key evidence goes missing.

programme.title: The First 48 (S25)
programme.desc: When a house fire turns out to be a triple murder involving a 7-year-old girl, Tulsa Homicide takes it personally.
