programme.title: Chiens Et Chats Sans Collier
programme.desc: Sisko, a recently arrived Australian shepherd, meets potential adopters. Aurelie visits Poly the cat, who is very cuddly after his surgery. Meanwhile, Tiffany and Christophe take Joy and Bebe for an animal assisted therapy session in a retirement home.

programme.title: Outremer.Gourmand
programme.desc: To celebrate the cuisine of the French overseas departments and territories, make a date with each episode featuring a personality from the world of gastronomy. On the menu: discoveries, sharing, and an explosion of flavours!

programme.title: Version Francaise
programme.desc: The Albert-Kahn museum unveils the banker's humanist project. Sometimes called ''the time folder'', Simone Pheulpin works with cotton ribbon. For his first show at Dries Van Noten, Julian Klausner plays with textures and colours. Sophie Brillouet's studio is alive with beach air.

programme.title: 6H Info
programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: Information and good humour, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Outremer.Gourmand
programme.desc: To celebrate the cuisine of the French overseas departments and territories, make a date with each episode featuring a personality from the world of gastronomy. On the menu: discoveries, sharing, and an explosion of flavours!

programme.title: Slam
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Chiens Et Chats Sans Collier
programme.desc: Sisko, a recently arrived Australian shepherd, meets potential adopters. Aurelie visits Poly the cat, who is very cuddly after his surgery. Meanwhile, Tiffany and Christophe take Joy and Bebe for an animal assisted therapy session in a retirement home.

programme.title: L'echappee Belge
programme.desc: Host Zoe Brunet and Adrien cross the Tarentaise by mountain bike and kayak. From Val d'Isere to Bourg-Saint-Maurice, they criss-cross the Vanoise National Park in a sumptuous Alpine setting.

programme.title: Edmond Et Lucy
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: Pompon Ours
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Pompon Ours
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Il etait Une Fois... Ces Droles D'Objets
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: L'Imagier Anime De Koumi
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: Belles Comptines D'Afrique
programme.desc: In each episode, an animal from the African continent is highlighted in song.

programme.title: Les Gardes Chimeres
programme.desc: Wendy and Thelma are spending the summer holidays at their grandfather's house in the heart of nature. As city dwellers, they're worried about getting bored. But this summer, the two sisters discover that their grandfather's estate is more than just a park: it is home to chimeras, amazing creatures with magical powers.

programme.title: Les Gardes Chimeres
programme.desc: Wendy and Thelma are spending the summer holidays at their grandfather's house in the heart of nature. As city dwellers, they're worried about getting bored. But this summer, the two sisters discover that their grandfather's estate is more than just a park: it is home to chimeras, amazing creatures with magical powers.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Cosy, Le Mag Deco
programme.desc: Caroline Boeglin goes in search of astonishing lodgings. She shares her love of finding objects in antique markets, her DIY ideas and her interior design touch that transforms a room. Decoration and renovation are the key words for her discoveries.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Contact
programme.desc: Georges St-Pierre is considered one of the most complete mixed martial arts athletes on the planet. He talks about his victory in 2004, which left him with ''a false sense of confidence'' and the reasons for his recent depression.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Le Jardin Extraordinaire
programme.desc: 60 years of travelling across all continents, to every corner of the world. 60 years recounting life on Earth! For the Garden's anniversary: exceptional archives, never before seen and fabulous images, and behind the scenes of the show...

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: On Acheve Bien Les Chevaux
programme.desc: Bruno Bouche, Clement Hervieu-Leger and Daniel San Pedro take on Horace McCoy's noir novel about dance marathons in the United States in 1929, where participants were prepared to dance to death. 32 dancers, 9 actors and 4 musicians in a visceral, out-of-this-world dance-theatre experience.

programme.title: Rassemblance
programme.desc: Sourdough breads, brioches and generous recipes are the keys to his success on social networks. Known under the pseudonym Cook as you feel it, Kodjo is a self-taught cook who arrived from Togo in France. A father and inspiring creator, he turns a childhood passion into a space for emancipation.

programme.title: Cesar Wagner
programme.desc: In the Vosges forest the authorities find the lifeless body of a journalist and animal rights activist, along with that of a lynx. The local hunters immediately become the prime suspects. A tragedy that exacerbates an already virulent conflict between hunters and the animal rights movement.

programme.title: Secrets Des Profondeurs
programme.desc: Sam and Mario set off in search of the ships torpedoed by the Germans just off the Newfoundland coast during the Second World War.

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What it's all about: the guests take an in-depth look at a key issue. Increased focus on Francophone cultural news, with dedicated sequences. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: L'Invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: En Marge Du Monde
programme.desc: Felix trained as a lawyer before leaving the fast-moving life of Montreal behind him to answer the call of the wild and become a hunter-gatherer in Chibougamau forest. With no running water, he learnt to live in almost total self-sufficiency while respecting nature. A remote life which suits him perfectly.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Rassemblance
programme.desc: Sourdough breads, brioches and generous recipes are the keys to his success on social networks. Known under the pseudonym Cook as you feel it, Kodjo is a self-taught cook who arrived from Togo in France. A father and inspiring creator, he turns a childhood passion into a space for emancipation.

programme.desc: Host Zoe Brunet and Adrien cross the Tarentaise by mountain bike and kayak. From Val d'Isere to Bourg-Saint-Maurice, they criss-cross the Vanoise National Park in a sumptuous Alpine setting.

programme.title: Le Journal Afrique
programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.title: L'Actu
programme.desc: The televised news programme from TVMonaco.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rts
programme.desc: All the news from RTS.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (8 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: L'Invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: C Dans L'Air
programme.desc: All the latest major events, presented, explained and analysed! Special guests and journalists in the studio analyse both the latest news but also other controversial issues to give us a better understanding of the social, political and cultural events occurring around us.

programme.title: Passe-Moi Les Jumelles
programme.desc: Michael Ottenwaelter became passionate about black gold, the name given to earthworm castings because they transform organic matter into fertile humus. When he meets Agnes and Sylvain Gerber, farmers who produce ecological and sustainable organic soil thanks to earthworms, his life takes a turn...

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Une Brique Dans Le Ventre
programme.desc: In addition to the houses, apartments and lofts of various styles and prices which Cedric Wautier and Virginie Jacobs show us through his many visits, this programme about homes offers legal, practical, technical, energy and aesthetic advice, without forgetting the part about the all-important DIY ''tricks''.
